subject: large dark wolf with a spiky porcupine-like ruff, bared teeth, charging through shadowy forest
description: A large, dark-furred wolf stands in an aggressive forward-charging posture in a shadowy forest. The wolf has an unusual and distinctive feature: a wide bristling ruff of rigid quill-like spikes radiating outward around its neck and shoulders, like a porcupine's quills. Its mouth is open, lips curled to show fangs. Its pale eyes carry a cold, intelligent menace. The forest behind it is dark and indistinct, with bare branch silhouettes at the edges of the frame.
foreground: large dark spike-ruffed wolf, bared fangs, charging pose
